name: Autonomyx Policy Review
description: Automated inbound vendor/website policy analysis via Autonomyx Gateway. Input: policy URL or policy text. Output: structured JSON analysis across 5 domains — Privacy, AI Training, Security, Carbon, Governance. Flags risks, deadline-bound actions, and changes. Single API call. For interactive analysis, use saas-policy-intelligence skill in Claude.

policy_text.placeholder: Paste the full policy text here (Privacy Policy, ToS, DPA, or any vendor policy document)

review_context.placeholder: e.g. We handle sensitive financial data. Evaluating for DPDP compliance. Indian customers only.

previous_version.placeholder: Paste previous version to detect changes

node.description: Vendor policy text and review context

model_name.info: Qwen3-30B-A3B with /think mode — better reasoning on policy nuance

node.description: Local reasoning model — policy text never leaves your VPS
Structured JSON policy analysis across 5 domains

variables.name: LANGFLOW_VIRTUAL_KEY
variables.description: LiteLLM virtual key for spend tracking

important_notes: This flow analyses INBOUND vendor policies — for drafting YOUR OWN policies use policy-creator.json
Policy text stays on your VPS — never sent to cloud models by default
Pass previous_version to detect what changed between policy versions
For interactive analysis with web search, use saas-policy-intelligence skill in Claude
DPDP 2023 compliance check included — relevant for Indian vendors and customers

api_example.curl:
curl -X POST https://flows.openautonomyx.com/api/v1/run/{flow_id} \
  -H 'Authorization: Bearer lf-your-api-key' \
  -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  -d '{"vendor_name": "Razorpay", "policy_text": "<paste policy text here>", "review_context": "We process payments for Indian SMEs. Need DPDP 2023 compliance."}'
